name: Remoulade Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix mayonnaise and Durkee's Famous Sauce.
2. Gradually pour in olive oil while beating, as you would when making mayonnaise.
3. Add Creole or Poupon mustard and beat again.
4. Add horseradish, then ketchup, wine vinegar, Lea & Perrins, and Louisiana hot sauce, beating after each addition.
5. Use the sauce over shrimp on salad or as a sandwich sauce.
